$comment: scripts/SilphCo11F.asm — the freed president's MASTER BALL. give_item's full-bag abort leaves GOT_MASTER_BALL unset, so he re-offers next talk (faithful to the retired _gift early-return).

then.text:
PRESIDENT: SILPH's
future depends on
young people
like you!

else.text:
PRESIDENT: Thank
you for saving
SILPH! I will never
forget you saved
us in our moment
of peril! Let me give you
this as thanks!

{player} got a
MASTER BALL! That's the best
BALL! It catches
anything, no fail!
